title: Token Plushie!
description: Allows you to have Token from femtanyl as a totem, carved pumpkin or as a simple decoration
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/cUUbg4Hk7Jw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

A simple texture pack that adds Token from hit digital hardcore artist femtanyl! 

- Rename a block of white wool to "Token" to get the custom model, then place it in an item frame to have a cool, possibly dangerous, new friend in your world!
- You can also rename carved pumpkins to have them sit on your head, or a totem of undying to have them save you from death when the time comes!

CITResewn/Optifine is **necessary** for this pack to work, otherwise renaming the items won't do anything. 
If you're still having trouble, I suggest downloading Entity Model Features too

Pack _should_ work on all versions 1.21-1.21.1 and below as long as you have CITResewn/Optifine installed.

_This pack sadly does NOT work in any versions above 1.21.1 **unless you have Optifine**, as CITResewn hasn't updated yet. There is sadly nothing I can do to fix this until it does - which it likely won't - as Mojang's vanilla CIT alternative is really convoluted for no reason and I don't plan on updating it to work without CIT anytime soon._


_Token skin used as a base made by CY4NN1D3 on PlanetMinecraft_
